lessons.title: Unit 1A: Letters ABC - Lesson 1: Letter A(a)
lessons.desc:
- Hello, Hi, Goodbye, Bye
ant, apple, alligator 
- letter A(a) and sound /æ/
- What's your name? I'm (Tony).
-  What is this? It's (an ant).

pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: Okay, now say the word one more time!
Let’s try it one more time: letter A
Now let’s say the word loudly!
Now, let's read one more time!
Good! Now, let's read again, please!
Let's repeat after me: what's your name?
pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: what's your name what's your name what your name what's your name

pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: Now let’s say the word loudly!
Let’s say it together: I'm Tom

pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: I am now time for a dialogue

conversation.question: Hello! Nice to see you. Are you ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
Hi! I’m ready when you are 😄
Hi. Nice to meet you 😄
Hi! How are you today? 🙂
Hi. Are you okay today? 🙂
Hi! Good to see you 😄
Hi! Nice to see you 😄
Hi, nice to meet you. Are you ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am ready. Hello! My name is [name].

conversation.question: Hi! I think you said “Day.” Do you mean “Good day” or “Good morning”? 😄
Good — nice choice. Say: “Good day.” 😄
Good job. Now say: “Hello, my name is ___.” 😄
Okay, do you mean “Okay” or “My name is ___”? 🙂
Nice. Say: “Hello, my name is ___.” 😄
Do you mean “Hello, my name is ___”? 😄

interactive.question: I say Hi, you say Hello
when I say goodbye, and you say bye

questions.question_text: Look and choose the best response for Linda (Con hãy nhìn tranh và chọn câu trả lời phù hợp cho Linda nhé!)
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: What's your name? - I'm Linda. Tạm dịch: Bạn tên gì vậy? - Tớ là Linda.

questions.question_text: Look and choose the best response for Linda (Con hãy nhìn tranh và chọn câu trả lời phù hợp cho Linda nhé!)
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: Goodbye. - Bye. Tạm dịch: Tạm biệt. - Tạm biệt.

questions.question_text: Look and choose the best response for Linda (Con hãy nhìn tranh và chọn câu trả lời phù hợp cho Linda nhé!)
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: Hello! - Hi! Tạm dịch: Xin chào! - Xin chào!

questions.question_text: Listen and choose the correct answer (Con hãy nghe và chọn câu trả lời đúng nhé!) A: Hello! => B: ............
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: Nhân vật A nói: Hello! (Tạm dịch: Xin chào!) Nhân vật B đáp: Hi! (Tạm dịch: Xin chào!) Câu trả lời chính xác là: Hi! (Tạm dịch: Xin chào!)

questions.question_text: Listen and choose the correct answer (Con hãy nghe và chọn đáp án đúng nhé!) A; What's your name? => B: ............
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: Nhân vật A hỏi: What's your name? (Tên của bạn là gì?) Nhân vật B đáp: I'm Tim. (Mình là Tim.) Câu trả lời chính xác là: I'm Tim. (Mình là Tim.)

questions.question_text: Listen and choose the correct answer (Con hãy nghe và chọn câu trả lời đúng nhé!) Richard: Bye! Lily: ............
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: Richard nói: Bye! (Tạm dịch: Tạm biệt nhé!) Lily: Goodbye! (Tạm dịch: Tạm biệt nhé!)

questions.question_text: Read and choose True or False (Con hãy đọc và chọn Đúng hoặc Sai nhé!) A: What's your name? B: I'm 3 years old.
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: A hỏi: What's your name? (Bạn tên gì?) B đáp: I'm 3 years old. (Hiện tại mình 3 tuổi.) Giải thích: A hỏi về tên nhưng B lại trả lời về tuổi => Câu trả lời này sai => Đáp án : False (Sai)

questions.question_text: Read and choose True or False (Con hãy đọc và chọn Đúng hoặc Sai nhé!) A: What's your name? B: I'm Emily.
questions.comment_plain: Đáp án chi tiết: A hỏi: What's your name? (Bạn tên gì?) B đáp: I'm Emily. (Mình tên Emily.) Giải thích: A và B đều hỏi và trả lời về thông tin tên. => Câu này đúng (True)

conversation.question: Hi! Nice to see you. Are you ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
Hello! Good. Let's start — say: 'Hello, my name is ...' 😄
Hi again — try: "Hello, my name is ___." 😄
Hello again — you can say: "Hello, my name is ___" 😄
Good. Try: "Hello, my name is [your name]." 😄
Try to say your full name, for example: Hello, my name is Ana. 😊
Nice try. Say: "Hello, my name is ___" and add your name. 😊
Hello! Ready to practice greetings together? 😄
Hello! Do you mean "jelly" or "Kelly" for a name? 😊
conversation.expected_transcript: I mean my jelly, it's a toy. I like it.

conversation.question: Nice to meet you, Kelly. How old are you? 😊
Oh, you are Kelly. How old are you? 😊
conversation.user_transcript: How old are you? I am six.

conversation.question: Nice, you are six. What time is your clock? ⏰
Good. What time is it now on your clock? ⏰
Great, it is eight o'clock. Do you like candy? 🍬
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like candy. I have candy at eight o'clock.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I like candy. I have a candy.

conversation.question: Great, hello! Nice answer. How do you say “hello” to a friend? 👋
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I am. Yes, I am ready.

conversation.question: Good, you said “Hi”. Nice. How do you say hello to a teacher? 😊
conversation.user_transcript: How do you say hello to a friend? Hi, hi.

conversation.question: Nice. You said “Hello teacher.” Good job 😊 How do you say goodbye to a friend? 👋
Good. You said “Bye bye.” Do you say that to one friend or to two friends? 😊
conversation.expected_transcript: I say "Bye bye" to one friend.

conversation.question: Good. You said it to one friend. 😊 What is your name?
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, hello, bye bye to one.

conversation.question: Nice to meet you, My name. What is your friend’s name? 😊
conversation.user_transcript: Dude, my name is my name.

conversation.question: Hi! Good. Let’s start. Say: Hello, my name is ___ 😄
Good try. Say: Hello, my name is [your name]. 😄
Good. Now say: Hello, my name is [your name]. 😄
Nice. Try adding your name at the end. 😄
Nice. Can you say: Hello, my name is Ana? 😄
Nice. You said it well. 😄

conversation.question: Hi! Nice to see you. Are you ready to talk about greetings and meet new friends? 😄
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am ready. I want to practice greetings.

conversation.question: Hello! I think you said ‘MDay’. Do you mean ‘My day’? 😄
Hi! I’m ready when you are 😄
Hello again — take your time, I’m here when you’re ready 😄
Good! Let’s practice greetings. Say: “Hello, my name is ___.” 😄
I’m fine, thanks. And you? 😊
conversation.expected_transcript: I’m good, thanks. How are you?

conversation.question: Nice. I like your answers 😄
Hello! Nice to see you. Ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
Hi — no problem. Do you mean "I am" or "I'm"? 🙂
Do you mean "Do I..." as a question like "Do I say hello?" 😊
Hi — it's okay, take your time. Ready to say 'Hello' with me? 😄
Hello — nice to see you. Ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
Hello, I'm here. Say 'Hello' when you are ready 😄
Hi. Do you want to say 'Hello' now? 😊

conversation.question: Hi! Nice to see you today. Are you ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
Hello! Good, let’s start. Say: “Hello, my name is ___.” 😊
Good try. Say your name after 'is', please. 🙂
Good. Now say your name after 'is'. 🙂
Good. Say your name now, please. 🙂
Nice. Hello, MA. How are you today? 😊
Oh, I see. Do you mean “I am good” or “I am fine”? 🙂
conversation.user_transcript: I am good or I'm fine. I am good.

conversation.question: Hello! Nice to see you. Are you ready to practice greetings with me? 😄
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am ready to practice greetings.

conversation.question: Hi! Great, let's start. Say: 'Hello, my name is ...' 👋
Good. Now say your name after 'is'. 😊
Good. Can you say your name now? 🙂
Hello, may I know your name please? 🙂
Nice. Hello, B 😊 What is your last name?
Good. Can you say your last name now? 🙂

conversation.question: Hi! Are you having fun today? 😀 Did you learn about any animals?
Zo? Hmm, that sounds like zoo! 🦁 Did you see an ant at the zoo?
Are *you* an ant? 🐜 I am not! Do you like apples? 🍎
You don't like apples? 🥺 Do you like alligators? They are big!
Why do I like alligators? 🤔 They are fun to draw! Do you like drawing?
Grrr! Like a bear? 🐻 Do you like bears?
That's okay. Maybe you like ants? They are small! 🐜
Hi! Are you having fun today? 🤩 What's your favorite thing about learning English?
conversation.user_transcript: Good job! What's your favorite thing about learning English?

conversation.question: Good job to you, too! 🎉 Do you like ants? 🐜
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like ants./ No, I don't like ants.

conversation.question: Maybe you like alligators? 🐊 Are alligators scary or cool?
Cool! 😎 Do you like to eat apples? 🍎
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like to eat apples.

conversation.question: Going somewhere? 😉 Do you like animals? 🦁
Yes, animals! 🐒 Which animal do you like? 😊
I like all animals! 🥰 Do you like big animals? 🐘
